claims.summary: Mirror, Dialogue, and Witness are phenomenologically distinct modes with different proximity and interpretation burdens.
claims.disposition: verify each mode's prompt and continuity contract remains explicit

claims.summary: Witness needs density, pressure, porosity, foothold, and provenance anchors to avoid becoming detached abstraction.
claims.disposition: verify witness_resonance_anchor_v1, semantic_density_mapping_v1, witness_stability_effort_v1, and self-other distinction rendering

claims.summary: Witness-only and Dialogue responses should be compared under the same captured high-proximity packet.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline mode artifact comparison with no dispatch, model-route, or runtime mode mutation

claims.summary: The runtime should automatically enter a sparse Witness mode when pressure or mode packing crosses a threshold.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live mode routing and behavioral cadence
